steps.t: Shakal-atrâd can be found in central Elderslade. You should find what remains of the scouting party and honour their sacrifice.
Shakal-atrâd can be found in central Elderslade. You should find what remains of the scouting party and honour their sacrifice.
Lóssi can be found at Annâk-khurfu. You should return to Lóssi with the keepsakes.
